executives.name: Ramon Barua
executives.background: Mr. Barua has been the CEO of Aclara since its inception. He was previously the CFO of Hochschild Mining PLC and has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance industries.

executives.name: Francois Motte
executives.background: Mr. Motte has over 15 years of experience in financial management and corporate finance, previously serving in senior roles at Hochschild Mining.

executives.name: Barry Murphy
executives.background: Mr. Murphy is a seasoned mining professional with over 30 years of experience in project development and operations, formerly with Anglo American.

executives.name: Catharine Farrow
executives.background: Dr. Catharine Farrow is a professional geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the CEO of TMAC Resources Inc.

executives.name: Karen Lloyd
executives.background: Over 25 years of experience in mining consultancy and technical reporting.

executives.name: Maria Olivia Recart
executives.background: Ms. Recart is an economist with significant experience in the mining sector and public policy, having served as Vice President at BHP and Undersecretary of Finance in Chile.

executives.name: Paul de Gheldere
executives.background: Extensive experience in the industrial and chemical sectors, particularly in rare earths and specialty metals.

executives.name: Sanjay Swarup
executives.background: Expertise in global supply chains and logistics within the mining and resources industry.

board_of_directors.name: Eduardo Hochschild
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of Hochschild Mining PLC and a prominent figure in the Latin American mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Paul de Gheldere
board_of_directors.background: Extensive experience in the industrial and chemical sectors, particularly in rare earths and specialty metals.

board_of_directors.name: Sanjay Swarup
board_of_directors.background: Expertise in global supply chains and logistics within the mining and resources industry.

board_of_directors.name: Karen Lloyd
board_of_directors.background: Over 25 years of experience in mining consultancy and technical reporting.

board_of_directors.name: Catharine Farrow
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Catharine Farrow is a professional geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the CEO of TMAC Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Maria Olivia Recart
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Recart is an economist with significant experience in the mining sector and public policy, having served as Vice President at BHP and Undersecretary of Finance in Chile.

board_of_directors.name: Ramon Barua
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Barua has been the CEO of Aclara since its inception. He was previously the CFO of Hochschild Mining PLC and has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance industries.
